title: Political consultant talks about the depositions of the Clintons in Epstein probe
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with political consultant and longtime Clinton ally Paul Begala  about the depositions of former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton.
content: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with political consultant and longtime Clinton ally Paul Begala  about the depositions of former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton.
